zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Peyton於1442年出生在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆時，他的父親Thomas de Peyton25歲，母親Margaret Bernard25歲。他於從1465年1月10日到1466年1月9日與Jane de Calthorpe在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年7月30日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年42歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Peyton于1442年出生在英国坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas de Peyton25岁，母亲Margaret Bernard25岁。他于从1465年1月10日到1466年1月9日与Jane de Calthorpe在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1484年7月30日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年42岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Peyton was born in 1442, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Thomas de Peyton, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Bernard, was 25. He married Jane de Calthorpe from 10 January 1465 to 9 January 1466, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 30 July 1484, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Peyton est né en 1442, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Peyton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bernard, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jane de Calthorpe du 10 janvier 1465 au 9 janvier 1466, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1484, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Peyton 1442 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Peyton 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Bernard 25. Er hat von 10. Januar 1465 bis 9. Januar 1466 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Jane de Calthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juli 1484 im Alter von 42 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Peyton è nato il nel 1442 nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Peyton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bernard, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jane de Calthorpe da 10 gennaio 1465 a 9 gennaio 1466, nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 30 luglio 1484, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Peytonが1442年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで生まれた時，父Thomas de Peytonは25歳，母Margaret Bernardは25歳であった。から1465年1月10日まで1466年1月9日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムでJane de Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1484年7月30日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで42歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Peyton(이)가 1442년 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Peyton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bernard(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1465년 1월 10일부터 1466년 1월 9일까지 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 Jane de Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 7월 30일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.1465: de 10 de janeiro de 1465 a 9 de janeiro de 1466
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Peyton nasceu em 1442, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Peyton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bernard, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane de Calthorpe de 10 de janeiro de 1465 a 9 de janeiro de 1466, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de julho de 1484, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Peyton родился в 1442 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Peyton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bernard, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de Calthorpe с 10 января 1465 по 9 января 1466 в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 30 июля 1484 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.1465: desde 10 de enero de 1465 hasta 9 de enero de 1466
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Peyton nació en 1442, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Peyton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Bernard, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jane de Calthorpe desde 10 de enero de 1465 hasta 9 de enero de 1466, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 30 de julio de 1484, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
